title: Dalek Mod - Time Vortex
description: The Time Vortex from [Doctor 𝕎ℍ𝕆] in Minecraft.
body:
# `Dalek Mod - Time Vortex`

### Please note that it's only an client side mod that should **NEVER** be installed on a server

`Dalek Mod - Time Vortex` is a client-side addon for the Dalek Mod for Minecraft.
That adds the Dalek Mod Vortex from 1.12.2 into the 1.16.5 Dalek Mod **as a Visual Effect**.

**Currently Used in:**
- the [`Title Screen`](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5xjQ7gB5/images/385a7d792e638c8973de99b9b85c1165555618bc.png)
- the [`Flight Panel`](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5xjQ7gB5/images/554a3522d69058e4fbe355d3f1d1650139f969a3.png) *(when dematerialised)*

**Will be Used in:**
- the `Tardis Exit Void` *(when dematerialised)*

#### Don't forget to check the config file ;-) -> `config/timevortex.toml`
#### Credits to the EdraxDoodles for the original code and textures. (and also SWD Team for not sueing me)
### Requires: [Dalek Mod [Forge]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-dalek-mod)
